summary: Tested new features: password reset (forgot/reset), CSV imports for flats and users, email notifications on invoice + complaint status change. All 8 backend tests pass (after fixing a tz-comparison bug in /api/auth/reset-password). Frontend forgot/reset pages, and CSV import dialogs on /app/flats and /app/users work as expected.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes → returned 500 for every valid token.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.rca: MongoDB (motor) returns datetime as timezone-naive UTC. Code compared it against `datetime.now(timezone.utc)` (tz-aware) causing TypeError.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added tzinfo=UTC coercion when expires_at is naive, before comparison, in /app/backend/server.py reset_password().

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription to CsvImport dialog to silence a11y console warning.
Optional: cleanup test-created flats/users (TB* / test_csv_* / TESTBLK) from previous iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: reset_password now correctly handles naive datetime from MongoDB — good to add same guard whenever mongo dates are compared.
forgot_password logs the full reset link (with token) at INFO — acceptable for dev/staging but should be gated behind DEBUG or removed in production to avoid token leakage via logs.

_notify_invoice_created and _notify_complaint_status await send_email_raw sequentially inside a single BackgroundTask; if a flat has many residents this serializes. Consider asyncio.gather for parallelism.
CSV imports do not enforce max file size / row limit — could be DoS vector; consider capping.
test_credentials: admin@maintyn.app / Admin@12345 (restored by test teardown after reset-password e2e)
seed_data_creation: Created transient test flats (block prefix TB<ts>) and users (email prefix test_csv_<ts>_) during CSV import tests; visible in Residents/Flats tables.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fix applied to server.py:369 (naive datetime coercion). All new feature tests green. Some TEST_ / TESTBLK / TB* residual seed data present in DB — can be safely purged.
verified_features: POST /api/auth/forgot-password (existing email) → 200 {ok:true}, backend log has reset link, Resend proxy 202
POST /api/auth/reset-password (valid token) → 200; login with new password succeeds; admin password restored after test
POST /api/flats/import-csv → creates 2, skips 1 duplicate, reports missing-row error
POST /api/users/import-csv → creates 2, links user to flat by block+number, reports missing name/email error
POST /api/invoices triggers background email — 'Email sent to <resident>: New invoice' in logs
PATCH /api/complaints/{id} status change triggers 'Email sent to <creator>: Complaint update: ...' in logs
Frontend /forgot-password renders and submits (forgot-email, forgot-submit → forgot-back-login on success)
Frontend /reset-password without token disables reset-submit; with token enables + submits
Frontend /app/flats has import-flats-btn opening dialog with csv-download-template, csv-pick-file, csv-upload-submit
Frontend /app/users has import-users-btn opening the same dialog
